message:
fix(web): enable iOS scrolling in jargon bottom sheet

The bottom sheet content couldn't be scrolled on iPhone due to:

1. Outer container used `overflow-hidden` without flex layout, so the
   inner scrollable div had no height constraint
2. Missing iOS-specific `-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch` property
3. No `overscroll-contain` to prevent scroll chaining

Fixed by:
- Using `flex flex-col` on outer container instead of `overflow-hidden`
- Adding `min-h-0 flex-1` to scrollable div (critical for flexbox scrolling)
- Adding `overscroll-contain` class for scroll containment
- Adding `WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch'` for iOS momentum scrolling
- Adding `shrink-0` to handle div to prevent it from collapsing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
